rationale: Coverity static analysis finding: resource leak in test helper code; no spec behavior involved.
BSON spec requires unique OIDs; driver reuses cached random after fork, producing duplicate OIDs; SPEC-1165 related.
Adding tests for deleteMany/updateMany with retryWrites=true; child of DRIVERS-574 test rollout.
Existing GridFS implementation not spec compliant; ticket creates new spec-compliant interface, deprecating old one.
Driver-only 'validate' option incorrectly included in server command; internal API mishandling, no named spec rule violated.
Build system improvement to support BUILD_VERSION override; references C++ driver as inspiration, not a behavioral divergence.
Install license files to standard $PREFIX/share/doc path; packaging improvement, no spec behavior involved.
Update change stream YAML tests for 4.1.1 drop notifications; child of DRIVERS-504 test rollout.
Driver sends writeConcern in getMore after aggregate-out with batchSize=0; spec forbids writeConcern in getMore.
Missing mongoc-prelude.h includes in some headers; build/header issue, no spec behavior involved.
arrayFilters appended as BSON document type (0x03) instead of array (0x04); caught by bulkWrite-arrayFilters.yml spec test.
Change stream spec requires resume token (_id) to be a document; driver does not error when token has wrong BSON type.
Warning logic improvement when retryWrites URI option parsed with crypto disabled; UX fix, not a spec violation.
Remove GitPython dependency from build version script; build tooling improvement, no driver behavior or spec involved.
Multi-write flag not set, causing txnNumber added to multi-update; retryable writes spec forbids txnNumber on multi-writes.
mongoc_collection_remove fails to set has_multi_write flag; txnNumber incorrectly sent, violating retryable writes spec.
User support question about 16MB document size limit; resolved as Done without driver fix.
Build error on MSYS2 due to missing __USE_MINGW_ANSI_STDIO; build issue, no spec behavior involved.
Function ignores database-level read preference when none passed; documented and server-selection spec behavior violated.
Documentation improvement for bson_iter_value lifetime semantics; no spec behavior involved.
Documentation typo: page shows mongoc_client_pool_min_size, should say max_size; no spec behavior.
API signature const-correctness fix for bson_iter_overwrite_decimal128; internal change, no spec rule violated.
Spec silent on empty username in URI; driver unexpectedly attempts auth; SPEC-1313 related suggests spec clarification needed.
Transactions spec: startTransaction SHOULD error if sharded cluster detected on 4.2; driver missing this check.
Transactions spec quoted directly: 'startTransaction SHOULD report an error...maxWireVersion < 7'; driver missing this check.
Documentation improvement: clarify mongoc_uri_*() pointer returns may be NULL; no spec behavior involved.
Reorder handshake platform string construction so wrapping driver info isn't truncated by CFLAGS/LDFLAGS; internal ordering improvement.
Socket wait internal bug when expire_at=-1 in MONGOC_ERROR_IS_AGAIN case; implementation detail, no named spec rule.
Build script fails under Python 3 due to bytes vs. string mismatch; build tooling bug, no spec involvement.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2085 + Improvement: disallow empty replicaSet string; proactive spec-rollout work, driver not previously wrong.
Missing libsasl2-dev dependency in Debian package; packaging bug, no spec driver behavior involved.
Insufficient detail; bson_string_free documentation error, no spec behavior described.
Index string generation wrong for Int64 direction; documented API mismatch but no named index spec rule violated.
PCCERT_CONTEXT pointer goes out of scope in optimized builds causing crash; TLS implementation bug, no spec rule.
SDAM spec quoted: 'A client SHOULD emit a warning when...it removes the last server from the topology'; driver missing this.
Null pointer dereference if server selection fails in start_transaction; implementation safety bug, not a spec rule violation.
Test runner requires all topology options to match instead of any one; bug in JSON test framework logic.
Write concern spec defines wtimeoutMS as 64-bit integer; libmongoc uses int32_t, causing spec non-compliance in wrappers too.
Evergreen upload/fetch path mismatch for release-branch projects; CI infrastructure bug, no spec involvement.
Add MongoDB 4.2 to Evergreen CI test matrix; child of DRIVERS-665, no driver behavior change.
Update CRUD spec test files to use runOn syntax per DRIVERS-679; test infrastructure update.
Improvement per SPEC-1292/DRIVERS-664 to stop sending $readPreference to standalones; new spec requirement, not existing nonconformance.
Title states 'spec's Resumable Error definition is too broad'; root cause is in the spec itself per DRIVERS-650.
Spec change requires clearing recovery token on transaction state transition to 'none' or 'started'; driver not doing this.
Transactions spec quoted: 'Drivers MUST NOT add...writeConcern inherited from the collection...to preceding commands in the transaction.'
CRUD spec requires countDocuments to always prepend $match stage; driver omits it when no filter is provided.
Transaction tests skipped on mongos due to stale skip logic; enabling CI test execution, not fixing driver behavior.
Driver aborts during OP_MSG bulk write on mid-batch socket failure; missing must_stop check is implementation bug, no spec rule.
Write concern appended after batch-full check, potentially exceeding max BSON size; batch-splitting implementation bug.
check_json_apm_events does not fail when extra actual APM events present beyond expected; test framework bug.
